医疗大模型.title: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio
医疗大模型.summary: Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question w
医疗大模型.abstract:
Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question with PI/ECO criteria, a retrieval corpus of 140k PubMed articles, verified positive studies, hard negatives that are topically similar but PI/ECO-ineligible, and complete search strategies and date bounds.
  Benchmarking twelve pipeline configurations (nine RAG variants and a protocol-driven agent) reveals a critical screening bottleneck: despite a retrieval ceiling of 90.9% recall at K=200, no system recovers more than 52.7% of ground-truth included literature. Current LLMs fail to reliably separate eligible studies from PI/ECO-failing distractors in pools of comparable topical relevance. Stage-attributed metrics capture where systems succeed and fail; a single end-to-end score does not.
医疗大模型.llm_keywords: 元分析, 大型语言模型, 基准测试, 证据合成, 文献筛选
医疗大模型.llm_summary: 本文介绍MetaSyn数据集，包含442篇Nature Portfolio的专家元分析，用于评估LLM在元分析全流程中的表现。测试12种配置发现，尽管检索召回率可达90.9%，但系统最多只能恢复52.7%的纳入文献，LLM难以区分符合PI/ECO标准的研究与主题相似但不合格的研究。
医疗大模型.abstract_cn: 元分析（Meta-analysis）是一种要求较高的证据合成形式，它结合了文献检索、基于PI/ECO（Population, Intervention/Exposure, Comparison, Outcome）的研究筛选以及统计汇总。其结构化、可验证的工作流程使其成为评估系统性科学推理的理想基础，然而现有的基准测试缺乏从检索到筛选再到合成的完整流程的基准真相（ground truth）。我们引入了MetaSyn，这是一个包含442篇来自Nature Portfolio期刊的专家精选元分析的数据集。每个条目都配有一个研究问题及其PI/ECO标准、一个包含14万篇PubMed文章的检索语料库、经过验证的阳性研究、主题相似但不符合PI/ECO标准的硬负样本（hard negatives），以及完整的检索策略和日期范围。对12种流水线配置（包括九种RAG变体和一个协议驱动型智能体）的基准测试揭示了一个关键的筛选瓶颈：尽管在K=200时的检索上限召回率（recall）达到90.9%，但没有一个系统能恢复超过52.7%的基准真相纳入文献。当前的LLM无法在主题相关性相当的文献池中可靠地将符合条件的研究与不符合PI/ECO标准的干扰项区分开来。按阶段划分的指标（stage-attributed metrics）能够捕捉系统成功与失败的具体环节，而单一的端到端评分则无法做到这一点。

医疗大模型.title: From 911 to Hospital: Challenges and Opportunities for AI Integration in Emergency Medical Services
医疗大模型.summary:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly introduced into healthcare settings, yet its integration into fast-paced, high-pressure domains such as Emergency Medical Services (EMS) remains limited. EMS work unfolds across distinct stages, each characterized by different information needs, constraints, and forms of collaboration. Designing effective AI support requires understanding how AI interventions align with, or disrupt, EMS work across its different stages.

医疗大模型.abstract:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly introduced into healthcare settings, yet its integration into fast-paced, high-pressure domains such as Emergency Medical Services (EMS) remains limited. EMS work unfolds across distinct stages, each characterized by different information needs, constraints, and forms of collaboration. Designing effective AI support requires understanding how AI interventions align with, or disrupt, EMS work across its different stages.
  We conducted semi-structured interviews with 25 EMS clinicians across the United States to examine how existing technologies currently support emergency services workflows and how they envision opportunities for, and concerns about, future AI-based support across different stages of emergency response. Our analysis reveals the cognitive, social, and procedural factors that enable EMS team coordination, which is grounded in situational awareness across distributed roles. EMS clinicians expressed significant concerns about how AI integration threatens this coordination mechanism across multiple dimensions: legal and privacy issues, technical reliability, contextual sensitivity, professional autonomy, and workflow friction. We propose five design principles for AI systems that augment distributed cognition and situational awareness, enabling EMS teams to deliver effective care under extreme constraints.
医疗大模型.llm_keywords: 人工智能, 紧急医疗服务, 分布式认知, 情境意识, 工作流程
医疗大模型.llm_summary: 本文通过访谈25名美国EMS临床医生，分析了现有技术如何支持紧急医疗服务工作流程，以及他们对未来AI支持的期望与担忧。研究发现AI整合可能威胁团队协调机制，并提出了五项设计原则以增强分布式认知和情境意识。
医疗大模型.abstract_cn: 人工智能（AI）正越来越多地被引入医疗环境，但其在紧急医疗服务（EMS）等快节奏、高压领域的整合仍然有限。EMS工作在不同阶段展开，每个阶段具有不同的信息需求、约束条件和协作形式。设计有效的AI支持需要理解AI干预如何与EMS工作在不同阶段保持一致或产生干扰。我们与美国25名EMS临床医生进行了半结构化访谈，以考察现有技术如何支持紧急服务工作流程，以及他们如何设想未来基于AI的支持在不同应急响应阶段的机会和担忧。我们的分析揭示了使EMS团队协调成为可能的认知、社会和程序因素，这种协调基于跨分布式角色的情境意识。EMS临床医生对AI整合如何在多个维度上威胁这种协调机制表达了重大担忧：法律和隐私问题、技术可靠性、情境敏感性、专业自主性和工作流程摩擦。我们提出了五项AI系统设计原则，以增强分布式认知和情境意识，使EMS团队能够在极端约束下提供有效护理。

医疗大模型.title: Compositional Reasoning Depth Predicts Clinical AI Failure: Empirical Evidence Consistent with Transformer Compositionality Limits in Electronic Health Record Question Answering
医疗大模型.summary: Aggregate accuracy benchmarks conceal a systematic structure in how large language models fail at electronic health record (EHR) question answering: questions requiring more inferential steps produce disproportionately more errors. Motivated by theoretical results on transformer compositionality limits, we introduce a pre-specified hop-count taxonomy -- the number of distinct reasoning steps required to answer a clinical question from an EHR -- as a principled predictor of model failure. We anno
医疗大模型.abstract: Aggregate accuracy benchmarks conceal a systematic structure in how large language models fail at electronic health record (EHR) question answering: questions requiring more inferential steps produce disproportionately more errors. Motivated by theoretical results on transformer compositionality limits, we introduce a pre-specified hop-count taxonomy -- the number of distinct reasoning steps required to answer a clinical question from an EHR -- as a principled predictor of model failure. We annotate 313 clinician-generated MedAlign EHR question-answer pairs across four hop levels and evaluate 301 questions in a within-model ablation (claude-sonnet-4-6, zero-shot vs. extended thinking) and cross-architecture replications (gpt-4o and gpt-5.4-2026-03-05, zero-shot). All three models, spanning two providers and two OpenAI generations (GPT-4 and GPT-5), show monotone accuracy decline with hop count: Claude Sonnet zero-shot falls from 30.6% (hop=1) to 17.6% (hop=4) (Cochran-Armitage z=-2.30, p=0.011; OR per hop 0.72, 95% CI [0.56,0.92], p=0.008); GPT-4o replicates this (37.8% to 14.7%; OR 0.58 [0.45,0.75], p<0.001); and gpt-5.4-2026-03-05 confirms it (37.8% to 23.5%; OR 0.80 [0.66,0.98], p=0.027). A pre-specified context-sufficiency audit shows higher-hop questions are not differentially disadvantaged by EHR truncation (answerability 93-95% at hops 2-4 vs. 79% at hop=1), so the decline reflects compositional reasoning difficulty. Extended thinking did not significantly flatten the accuracy-depth curve across three reasoning conditions, and thinking-token usage scaled with hop count (r=0.31, p<0.0001), consistent with the predicted O(k) computational requirement. Hop count is thus a theory-motivated, cross-architecture predictor of large-language-model error on EHR question answering, with direct implications for deployment risk stratification of clinical AI.
医疗大模型.llm_keywords: 大语言模型, 电子健康记录, 组合推理深度, 问答系统, 临床AI
医疗大模型.llm_summary: 研究发现，大语言模型在电子健康记录问答中的错误率随推理步骤增加而单调上升，跨模型和架构一致，提示组合推理深度是预测临床AI失败的理论驱动指标。
医疗大模型.abstract_cn: 聚合准确率基准掩盖了大语言模型在电子健康记录（EHR）问答中失败的系统性结构：需要更多推理步骤的问题会产生不成比例的更多错误。受关于Transformer组合性限制的理论结果启发，我们引入了一个预先指定的跳数分类法——回答一个来自EHR的临床问题所需的不同推理步骤数量——作为模型失败的原则性预测因子。我们在四个跳数级别上标注了313个由临床医生生成的MedAlign EHR问答对，并在模型内消融（claude-sonnet-4-6，零样本 vs. 扩展思考）和跨架构复制（gpt-4o和gpt-5.4-2026-03-05，零样本）中评估了301个问题。来自两个提供商和两代OpenAI（GPT-4和GPT-5）的所有三个模型都显示出准确率随跳数单调下降：Claude Sonnet零样本从30.6%（跳数=1）降至17.6%（跳数=4）（Cochran-Armitage z=-2.30，p=0.011；每跳比值比0.72，95% CI [0.56,0.92]，p=0.008）；GPT-4o复制了这一结果（37.8%降至14.7%；比值比0.58 [0.45,0.75]，p<0.001）；gpt-5.4-2026-03-05证实了这一点（37.8%降至23.5%；比值比0.80 [0.66,0.98]，p=0.027）。一项预先指定的上下文充分性审计显示，较高跳数的问题并未因EHR截断而受到不成比例的不利影响（跳数2-4的可回答性为93-95%，而跳数1为79%），因此准确率下降反映了组合推理难度。扩展思考在三种推理条件下并未显著平缓准确率-深度曲线，并且思考令牌使用量与跳数呈正相关（r=0.31，p<0.0001），这与预测的O(k)计算需求一致。因此，跳数是一个理论驱动、跨架构的大语言模型在EHR问答中错误的预测因子，对临床AI的部署风险分层具有直接意义。

医疗数据集.title: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio
医疗数据集.summary: Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question w
医疗数据集.abstract:
Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question with PI/ECO criteria, a retrieval corpus of 140k PubMed articles, verified positive studies, hard negatives that are topically similar but PI/ECO-ineligible, and complete search strategies and date bounds.
  Benchmarking twelve pipeline configurations (nine RAG variants and a protocol-driven agent) reveals a critical screening bottleneck: despite a retrieval ceiling of 90.9% recall at K=200, no system recovers more than 52.7% of ground-truth included literature. Current LLMs fail to reliably separate eligible studies from PI/ECO-failing distractors in pools of comparable topical relevance. Stage-attributed metrics capture where systems succeed and fail; a single end-to-end score does not.
医疗数据集.llm_keywords: 元分析, 大型语言模型, 基准测试, 证据合成, 文献筛选
医疗数据集.llm_summary: 本文介绍MetaSyn数据集，包含442篇Nature Portfolio的专家元分析，用于评估LLM在元分析全流程中的表现。测试12种配置发现，尽管检索召回率可达90.9%，但系统最多只能恢复52.7%的纳入文献，LLM难以区分符合PI/ECO标准的研究与主题相似但不合格的研究。
医疗数据集.abstract_cn: 元分析（Meta-analysis）是一种要求较高的证据合成形式，它结合了文献检索、基于PI/ECO（Population, Intervention/Exposure, Comparison, Outcome）的研究筛选以及统计汇总。其结构化、可验证的工作流程使其成为评估系统性科学推理的理想基础，然而现有的基准测试缺乏从检索到筛选再到合成的完整流程的基准真相（ground truth）。我们引入了MetaSyn，这是一个包含442篇来自Nature Portfolio期刊的专家精选元分析的数据集。每个条目都配有一个研究问题及其PI/ECO标准、一个包含14万篇PubMed文章的检索语料库、经过验证的阳性研究、主题相似但不符合PI/ECO标准的硬负样本（hard negatives），以及完整的检索策略和日期范围。对12种流水线配置（包括九种RAG变体和一个协议驱动型智能体）的基准测试揭示了一个关键的筛选瓶颈：尽管在K=200时的检索上限召回率（recall）达到90.9%，但没有一个系统能恢复超过52.7%的基准真相纳入文献。当前的LLM无法在主题相关性相当的文献池中可靠地将符合条件的研究与不符合PI/ECO标准的干扰项区分开来。按阶段划分的指标（stage-attributed metrics）能够捕捉系统成功与失败的具体环节，而单一的端到端评分则无法做到这一点。

医疗数据集.title: A Multi-Center Benchmark for Abdominal Disease Diagnosis and Report Generation from Non-Contrast CT
医疗数据集.summary: Multiphasic contrast-enhanced CT (CECT) is widely used for abdominal lesion characterization, yet it carries inherent risks of contrast-induced nephropathy, escalates acquisition burden, and heavily contributes to radiologist workload. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel multi-center benchmark for multi-organ abdominal disease diagnosis and automated radiology report generation, which learns to synthesize contrast-enhanced findings from single-phase non-contrast CT (NCCT). To suppo
医疗数据集.abstract: Multiphasic contrast-enhanced CT (CECT) is widely used for abdominal lesion characterization, yet it carries inherent risks of contrast-induced nephropathy, escalates acquisition burden, and heavily contributes to radiologist workload. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel multi-center benchmark for multi-organ abdominal disease diagnosis and automated radiology report generation, which learns to synthesize contrast-enhanced findings from single-phase non-contrast CT (NCCT). To support this, we curated a large-scale dataset of paired NCCT-CECT studies and their corresponding contrast-enhanced radiology reports from two centers, partitioned into internal sets and an external validation cohort. Under a unified evaluation protocol, we benchmarked five contemporary deep learning architectures encompassing chest-specific, abdomen-specific, and general-purpose multimodal domains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NCCT retains diagnostic signals, achieving an average multi-organ AUC of 69.1% on the internal cohort and 63.1% on the external cohort, respectively. By releasing this dataset and standardized benchmark publicly, this study aims to catalyze future research into safer, resource-efficient, and globally accessible contrast-free abdominal imaging workflows. Code is available at: https://github.com/xmed-lab/TriALS-Report.
医疗数据集.llm_keywords: 非增强CT, 腹部疾病诊断, 报告生成, 多中心基准, 对比增强CT
医疗数据集.llm_summary: 该研究提出了一个多中心基准，用于从单期非增强CT（NCCT）进行多器官腹部疾病诊断和自动放射学报告生成，通过配对NCCT-CECT数据集和统一评估协议，验证了NCCT的诊断潜力，旨在推动更安全、资源高效的对比剂-free腹部成像研究。
医疗数据集.abstract_cn: 多期对比增强CT（CECT）广泛用于腹部病变表征，但存在对比剂肾病风险、增加采集负担和放射科医生工作量。为解决这些问题，我们引入了一个新的多中心基准，用于多器官腹部疾病诊断和自动放射学报告生成，该基准学习从单期非增强CT（NCCT）合成对比增强发现。为此，我们收集了来自两个中心的大规模配对NCCT-CECT数据集及其对应的对比增强放射学报告，分为内部集和外部验证队列。在统一评估协议下，我们评估了五种当代深度学习架构，涵盖胸部专用、腹部专用和通用多模态领域。大量实验表明，NCCT保留了诊断信号，在内部队列和外部队列上分别实现了平均多器官AUC为69.1%和63.1%。通过公开发布该数据集和标准化基准，本研究旨在推动未来对更安全、资源高效且全球可及的对比剂-free腹部成像工作流程的研究。代码地址：https://github.com/xmed-lab/TriALS-Report。

医疗数据集.title: Federated Medical Image Segmentation under Real-World Label Noise: A Benchmark Suite for Noisy Label Learning Method Selection
医疗数据集.summary: While federated learning (FL) enables collaborative medical image segmentation without centralizing sensitive data, real-world deployment is frequently complicated by cross-site label imperfections such as contour disagreement, missing or additional structures, and confused labels. Federated noisy label learning (FNLL) aims to mitigate these effects, yet remains underused in practice as existing evidence is largely based on synthetic noise, simplified settings, and limited real-world noisy evalu
医疗数据集.abstract: While federated learning (FL) enables collaborative medical image segmentation without centralizing sensitive data, real-world deployment is frequently complicated by cross-site label imperfections such as contour disagreement, missing or additional structures, and confused labels. Federated noisy label learning (FNLL) aims to mitigate these effects, yet remains underused in practice as existing evidence is largely based on synthetic noise, simplified settings, and limited real-world noisy evaluation. We address this gap by introducing a benchmark suite that combines diverse real-world noisy datasets, deployment-relevant client-noise scenarios, and label-noise-targeted evaluation to support systematic FNLL assessment and informed method selection. The suite combines curated real-world noisy medical image segmentation datasets from diverse sources with a comprehensive federated segmentation framework including various client-noise scenarios and noise-targeted evaluation. The presented suite provides a realistic and discriminative basis for FNLL evaluation in medical image segmentation and establishes a reusable foundation for fair benchmarking, dataset-specific label-noise characterization, and future method development under realistic federated settings. Code is available at https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/FedSegNoiseBench.
医疗数据集.llm_keywords: 联邦学习, 医学图像分割, 标签噪声, 基准测试, 噪声标签学习
医疗数据集.llm_summary: 本文针对联邦学习在医学图像分割中面临的真实世界标签噪声问题，构建了一个基准测试套件，包含多种真实噪声数据集、客户端噪声场景和针对性评估方法，以支持联邦噪声标签学习的系统评估和方法选择。
医疗数据集.abstract_cn: 尽管联邦学习（FL）能够在不集中敏感数据的情况下实现协作式医学图像分割，但实际部署中常因跨站点的标签不完善（如轮廓不一致、结构缺失或多余、标签混淆）而变得复杂。联邦噪声标签学习（FNLL）旨在减轻这些影响，但在实践中仍未被充分利用，因为现有证据主要基于合成噪声、简化设置和有限的真实噪声评估。我们通过引入一个基准测试套件来填补这一空白，该套件结合了多样化的真实噪声数据集、部署相关的客户端噪声场景以及针对标签噪声的评估，以支持系统的FNLL评估和知情的方法选择。该套件将来自不同来源的精心策划的真实噪声医学图像分割数据集与一个全面的联邦分割框架（包括各种客户端噪声场景和针对噪声的评估）相结合。所提出的套件为医学图像分割中的FNLL评估提供了现实且具有区分性的基础，并为公平基准测试、数据集特定的标签噪声表征以及未来在现实联邦设置下的方法开发建立了可重复使用的基础。代码可在 https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/FedSegNoiseBench 获取。

医疗智能体.title: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio

医疗智能体.abstract:
Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question with PI/ECO criteria, a retrieval corpus of 140k PubMed articles, verified positive studies, hard negatives that are topically similar but PI/ECO-ineligible, and complete search strategies and date bounds.
  Benchmarking twelve pipeline configurations (nine RAG variants and a protocol-driven agent) reveals a critical screening bottleneck: despite a retrieval ceiling of 90.9% recall at K=200, no system recovers more than 52.7% of ground-truth included literature. Current LLMs fail to reliably separate eligible studies from PI/ECO-failing distractors in pools of comparable topical relevance. Stage-attributed metrics capture where systems succeed and fail; a single end-to-end score does not.
医疗智能体.llm_keywords: 元分析, 大型语言模型, 基准测试, 证据合成, 文献筛选
医疗智能体.llm_summary: 本文介绍MetaSyn数据集，包含442篇Nature Portfolio的专家元分析，用于评估LLM在元分析全流程中的表现。测试12种配置发现，尽管检索召回率可达90.9%，但系统最多只能恢复52.7%的纳入文献，LLM难以区分符合PI/ECO标准的研究与主题相似但不合格的研究。
医疗智能体.abstract_cn: 元分析（Meta-analysis）是一种要求较高的证据合成形式，它结合了文献检索、基于PI/ECO（Population, Intervention/Exposure, Comparison, Outcome）的研究筛选以及统计汇总。其结构化、可验证的工作流程使其成为评估系统性科学推理的理想基础，然而现有的基准测试缺乏从检索到筛选再到合成的完整流程的基准真相（ground truth）。我们引入了MetaSyn，这是一个包含442篇来自Nature Portfolio期刊的专家精选元分析的数据集。每个条目都配有一个研究问题及其PI/ECO标准、一个包含14万篇PubMed文章的检索语料库、经过验证的阳性研究、主题相似但不符合PI/ECO标准的硬负样本（hard negatives），以及完整的检索策略和日期范围。对12种流水线配置（包括九种RAG变体和一个协议驱动型智能体）的基准测试揭示了一个关键的筛选瓶颈：尽管在K=200时的检索上限召回率（recall）达到90.9%，但没有一个系统能恢复超过52.7%的基准真相纳入文献。当前的LLM无法在主题相关性相当的文献池中可靠地将符合条件的研究与不符合PI/ECO标准的干扰项区分开来。按阶段划分的指标（stage-attributed metrics）能够捕捉系统成功与失败的具体环节，而单一的端到端评分则无法做到这一点。
